rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FELIPE R. VELA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition By The Ibarra Professional Law Corporation To Compel The Administrator To Pay The Statutory Fees Pursuant To The Order For Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/25/2026 to be calendared with administrator-client's petition for final distribution, as no request for dismissal has been filed by petitioning attorneys, nor has the Court received a request to take this petition off calendar in favor of granting the administrator-client's petition for final distribution calendared herewith.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FELIPE R. VELA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/25/2026 for the following issues to be addressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) Absent signed waivers, notice must be given on the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-120 to the decedent's sister and her issue, despite their disclaimers. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 3) The legal description of the estate's real property interest must be set forth in the petition and proposed order. See CRC 7.651(b)(3). 4) The Court's payment record indicates that petitioner reimbursed $1,336 to the Court on 06/23/2023. The balance that must be reimbursed appears to be the motion filing fee of $60 (instead of $40 as alleged) waived on 03/24/2023. 5) Are petitioner's attorneys withdrawing their fee petition calendared herewith? No request for dismissal has been filed, nor has the Court received a request to take the attorneys'fee petition off calendar in favor of granting this petition for final distribution.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN A. MOKRICKY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court may inquire further into the steps or efforts the petitioner has taken to locate Robert J. McKee, the brother of the predeceased spouse. The declaration filed on 2/11/2026 appears insufficient. The declaration does not give the Court enough grounds to issue a final and binding order for entitlement, since Robert J's status could affect what entitlement is appropriate to the nearest generation. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROWLEY AND LONNIE WONG REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Pursuant To Cal. Probate Code 850 A 3 A And 850 B; Request For Statement Of Decision; Objection To Hearsay And Out Of Court Evidence: And Requesy For Evidentiary Hearing And Trial
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1. Court to determine whether this petition needs to proceed as a quiet title action in civil court and whether the ex parte application to notice by publication should be granted. 2. Settlors' granddaughters are listed in the trust as beneficiaries, but the petition fails to state their names and last known addresses [CRC 7.902]. Notice of Hearing also has not been filed, which must be on the proper Judicial Council Form (DE-115). Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.
